articles.original_title: ‘My country needs you’: The PM’s pitch and family BBQ that convinced Luai to commit to Chiefs

A2.title: PM Helps Chiefs Sign Player
A2.body: The PM spoke to a player. He wanted him to play for Chiefs. The player liked the PM's words. He signed for Chiefs. The team is happy. The player is happy too. He will play for Chiefs now.

B1.title: PM Helps Chiefs Sign Player
B1.body: The Prime Minister of Papua New Guinea, James Marape, helped the Chiefs sign a new player. The team's officials invited the player, Luai, to a barbecue. They served koftas and kebabs. The officials and the player played football in the backyard. But it was the Prime Minister's passionate speech that convinced Luai to join the team. The Prime Minister said his country needed Luai. This event happened recently. The player's decision is important for the team and the country. The Prime Minister's words made a big difference. Luai is now a part of the Chiefs team. He will play for them soon.

B2.title: PM's Pitch Wins Over Luai
B2.body: Papua New Guinea Chiefs officials made a strong effort to sign their top target, Luai, with a family barbecue featuring koftas and kebabs, as well as a game of backyard football. However, it was an emotional appeal by Prime Minister James Marape that ultimately convinced Luai to commit to the team. The premier's passionate plea highlighted the importance of Luai's involvement and the impact it would have on the country. This personal approach proved to be the decisive factor in Luai's decision. The signing is a significant boost to the Chiefs, and the team is eager to see Luai in action. The premier's intervention demonstrates the high level of interest in the team's success. With Luai on board, the Chiefs are looking forward to a successful season, and the country is excited to see the team thrive. This move is expected to have a positive impact on the sport as a whole.

C1.title: Premier's Plea Secures Luai
C1.body: In a remarkable display of persuasion, Papua New Guinea's premier, James Marape, successfully convinced Luai to commit to the Chiefs. The premier's impassioned plea, which underscored the significance of Luai's involvement, proved to be the decisive factor in his decision. The recruitment process, which took place in an informal setting, involved Chiefs officials engaging in convivial interactions with Luai over a family barbecue, replete with koftas and kebabs. Nevertheless, it was the premier's fervent appeal, imbued with a sense of national pride and purpose, that ultimately swayed Luai's decision. The premier's words, which resonated deeply with Luai, emphasized the importance of his contribution to the team and the nation. This pivotal moment, facilitated by the premier's eloquence and sincerity, has significant implications for the Chiefs and the country as a whole. The premier's ability to inspire and motivate individuals, as evident in this instance, is a testament to his leadership acumen. By securing Luai's commitment, the premier has demonstrated his capacity to bring people together and foster a sense of national unity, which is essential for the country's progress and development.

articles.original_title: Hospitals and Chatbots: How AI is rewriting medical consultation in Nigeria

A2.title: AI Helps Nigeria
A2.body: People in Nigeria use chatbots. They ask for health help. The system is very busy. AI is changing things. Patients get answers from chatbots. It is a new way to get help.

B1.title: AI Changes Medical Care
B1.body: In Nigeria, patients are using chatbots for medical advice. The healthcare system is under pressure, so people are looking for new ways to get help. Chatbots can answer questions and give advice. This is possible because of artificial intelligence, or AI. AI is changing how medical consultations work in Nigeria. Patients can now get help online. This is important because many people in Nigeria do not have access to good healthcare. Chatbots can help fill this gap. The use of chatbots is a new development in Nigeria's healthcare system. It is an interesting example of how technology can improve people's lives. Many patients are using chatbots and finding them helpful.

B2.title: AI Rewrites Medical Consultations
B2.body: In Nigeria, patients are turning to chatbots for medical advice due to a strained healthcare system. This shift is largely driven by the ease of access to technology and the shortage of medical professionals. As a result, AI is transforming the way medical consultations are conducted. Chatbots are being used to provide patients with initial diagnoses and treatment options. This development is significant, as it has the potential to improve healthcare outcomes in Nigeria. The use of chatbots also helps to reduce the workload of medical professionals, allowing them to focus on more complex cases. Furthermore, chatbots can provide patients with basic medical information and support, which can help to alleviate the pressure on the healthcare system. The integration of AI in healthcare is a growing trend, and Nigeria is at the forefront of this development. The impact of this trend will be closely monitored in the coming years.

C1.title: AI Revolutionizes Nigerian Healthcare
C1.body: The advent of artificial intelligence in Nigeria's healthcare sector has precipitated a paradigm shift in medical consultations, as an increasing number of patients are opting to utilize chatbots to solicit medical advice. This burgeoning trend is largely attributable to the country's strained healthcare system, which has been plagued by a plethora of issues, including a dearth of medical professionals and inadequate infrastructure. Consequently, chatbots have emerged as a viable alternative, providing patients with expedient and efficacious access to medical information. The integration of AI in healthcare has also enabled medical professionals to streamline their workflows, thereby enhancing the overall quality of care. Furthermore, the proliferation of chatbots has facilitated the dissemination of health-related information, thereby promoting health awareness and education amongst the populace. This phenomenon is poised to have far-reaching implications for Nigeria's healthcare landscape, as it has the potential to mitigate the strain on the existing healthcare system. The incorporation of AI in healthcare is a testament to the country's burgeoning technological prowess, and its impact is likely to be felt for years to come. The future of medical consultations in Nigeria is undoubtedly being rewritten, and AI is at the forefront of this revolution.

B1.title: YXT Files Annual Report

They announced this news on April 29, 2026. YXT.com is listed on the NASDAQ stock market. The report is important for investors and shows the company's progress. YXT.com provides enterprise productivity solutions using AI technology. The company's report is available now. This news is important for people who invest in YXT.com. The report gives information about the company's financial situation. YXT.com is a leading company in its field and its report is highly anticipated.

B2.title: YXT.com Files Annual Report
B2.body: YXT.com Group Holding Limited, a company based in Suzhou, China, recently filed its annual report for 2025. The report, known as Form 20-F, was submitted to the relevant authorities. As a provider of AI-enabled enterprise productivity solutions, YXT.com aims to help businesses work more efficiently. The company is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol YXT. By filing its annual report, YXT.com is meeting its regulatory requirements. This report provides stakeholders with important information about the company's financial performance and operations. The filing of the report is a significant event for the company, as it demonstrates transparency and accountability. The report is available for review, giving investors and other interested parties insight into YXT.com's activities and financial health. This information is crucial for making informed decisions about the company. The report's submission was announced on April 29, 2026.

C1.title: YXT.com Submits Annual Report
C1.body: In a pivotal development, YXT.com Group Holding Limited, a trailblazing provider of AI-enabled enterprise productivity solutions, has formally submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year 2025. This submission, as stipulated by the regulatory framework, underscores the company's commitment to transparency and accountability. Notably, the report furnishes a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance, strategic initiatives, and operational milestones. As a NASDAQ-listed entity, YXT.com's adherence to reporting requirements is paramount, ensuring that stakeholders are apprised of the company's progress and prospects. The report's submission on April 29, 2026, via GLOBE NEWSWIRE, serves as a testament to the company's dedication to maintaining the highest standards of corporate governance and disclosure. Furthermore, the report's submission is a critical component of YXT.com's ongoing efforts to bolster its reputation as a responsible and trustworthy corporate citizen, thereby fostering a culture of transparency and accountability.

articles.original_title: Perovskite diode reaches 26.7% PCE and 31% EQE in dual PV–LED operation

A2.title: New Solar Cell Found
A2.body: Researchers in China and the US made a new solar cell. It works as a solar cell and a light. They used a special layer to make it work. It is good for the environment. The new cell is very efficient.

B1.title: New Solar Cell Breakthrough
B1.body: Researchers from China and the US have made a new solar cell that works well as both a solar cell and a light. The device uses a special layer that is 800 nm thick. This layer has small islands of a material called alumina that help the device work efficiently. The solar cell can turn sunlight into power and also give off light like a LED. This is a big step forward because usually, solar cells and LEDs need different thicknesses to work well. The new device solves this problem and could lead to new technologies. It was made by a team from the University of Science and Technology of China and the University of Colorado Boulder. They used special nanoparticles to create the device.

B2.title: Breakthrough Perovskite Diode
B2.body: Researchers from the University of Science and Technology of China and the University of Colorado Boulder have made a significant breakthrough. They have created a perovskite diode that can act as both a solar cell and a high-efficiency LED. This device uses the same 800 nm thick absorber layer for both functions. The team embedded porous micrometer-scale alumina islands inside the perovskite, allowing for efficient light extraction. This architecture combines the thickness requirements of solar cells and LEDs in a single stack. The device has achieved 26.7% power conversion efficiency and 31% external quantum efficiency. This innovation could lead to more efficient and versatile energy harvesting and lighting systems. The perovskite diode's unique design enables it to reconcile the opposing thickness requirements of solar cells and LEDs, making it a promising technology for future applications.

C1.title: Perovskite Diode Breakthrough
C1.body: Researchers from the University of Science and Technology of China and the University of Colorado Boulder have successfully demonstrated a perovskite diode that can function as both an efficient solar cell and a high-efficiency LED, utilizing the same 800 nm thick absorber layer. This innovative device incorporates porous micrometer-scale alumina 'sponge' islands, approximately 5 μm wide and 0.5 μm tall, within the perovskite, thereby facilitating a layer thick enough for photovoltaics to also extract light efficiently like an LED. Notably, conventional perovskite LEDs rely on ultrathin, discontinuous layers, whereas efficient solar cells require substantially thicker layers. This novel architecture reconciles these opposing thickness requirements in a single stack, enabling the perovskite to grow through a porous, low-index network without disrupting charge transport. The surface-functionalized alumina nanoparticles assemble electrostatically into these islands, with one population coated with negatively charged Me-4PACz and the other with positively charged ODA. This breakthrough has significant implications for the development of dual-function devices, potentially revolutionizing the field of photovoltaics and optoelectronics. The perovskite diode's ability to achieve 26.7% PCE and 31% EQE in dual PV-LED operation underscores its vast potential.

articles.original_title: Lady Bearkatz win 3A-2 conference softball title

A2.title: Lady Team Wins Softball Title
A2.body: The Melbourne Lady Bearkatz won a softball game. They played the Mountain View Lady Yellowjackets. The score was 7-1. They won the 3A-2 Conference title on Thursday night. The team is happy. They played a good game.

B1.title: Lady Bearkatz Win Softball Title
B1.body: The Melbourne Lady Bearkatz won the 3A-2 Conference Championship on Thursday night. They beat the Mountain View Lady Yellowjackets 7-1. This was a road game, which made the win more impressive. The Lady Bearkatz played well and scored seven points. The Lady Yellowjackets scored only one point. The win was important for the Lady Bearkatz. They are now the champions of their conference. This is a big achievement for the team. They worked hard to get to this point. The Lady Bearkatz are happy with their win and look forward to their next game. They will try to keep winning.

B2.title: Lady Bearkatz Win Softball Title
B2.body: The Melbourne Lady Bearkatz secured the 3A-2 Conference Championship on Thursday night with an impressive 7-1 road victory over the Mountain View Lady Yellowjackets. This significant win demonstrates the team's skill and determination. The Lady Bearkatz played a strong game, resulting in a well-deserved championship title. Their performance showcased their ability to work together as a team. The conference championship is a notable achievement, reflecting the team's hard work and dedication throughout the season. The Lady Bearkatz's victory is a testament to their perseverance and commitment to softball. They have proven themselves to be a formidable team, and their win is a remarkable accomplishment. The team's success will likely inspire others to strive for similar achievements.

This decisive victory underscores the team's prowess and strategic acumen, as they navigated a potentially daunting away fixture with aplomb. articles.original_title: Claire Danes To Star in New Netflix TV Show From The Affair Showrunner

A2.title: Claire Danes New Netflix Show
A2.body: Netflix has a new show with Claire Danes. She plays a doctor. The show is from Sarah Treem. Claire Danes is the star. The show is about a surgeon. It is a new drama.

B1.title: Claire Danes Stars in Netflix Show
B1.body: Netflix has a new drama series with Claire Danes as the lead. The show is from Sarah Treem, who created The Affair. Claire Danes plays Annika, a famous breast cancer surgeon. Her life changes at work and home. The show is called Lovesick. Claire Danes is known for her roles in TV and film. She will now star in this new Netflix series. The show is a drama and will be available to stream. Netflix ordered the show and it will be released soon. The show's creator has experience with successful dramas. This new show will be interesting to watch. It has a great star and creator.

B2.title: Claire Danes Stars in New Netflix Drama
B2.body: Netflix has commissioned a new drama series featuring Claire Danes in the lead role. The project is the brainchild of Sarah Treem, co-creator and showrunner of the Golden Globe-winning series The Affair. Danes will portray Annika, a prominent breast cancer surgeon whose life undergoes a significant transformation. This shift affects both her professional and personal spheres, leading to a complex exploration of her character. The series, titled Lovesick, is set to premiere on Netflix, marking a new collaboration between the streaming giant and Treem. With Danes on board, the show is expected to garner significant attention. As a renowned actress, Danes is likely to bring depth to her character, making the series a compelling watch. The show's themes and Danes' involvement make it a highly anticipated release, with fans eagerly awaiting its debut, and it will undoubtedly be a talking point in the entertainment industry.

C1.title: Claire Danes Stars in Netflix Drama
C1.body: Netflix has commissioned a novel straight-to-series drama, with the esteemed actress Claire Danes slated to assume the lead role. This forthcoming project is the brainchild of Sarah Treem, the co-creator and showrunner of the Golden Globe-winning drama, The Affair, which aired on Showtime. Danes is set to portray Annika, a distinguished breast cancer surgeon whose personal and professional sphere undergoes a profound metamorphosis. This new series, aptly titled Lovesick, promises to be a captivating and emotionally charged narrative, replete with complex characters and poignant storylines. As a renowned actress, Danes' involvement in this project is likely to garner significant attention and acclaim. The collaboration between Danes and Treem is poised to yield a compelling drama that will resonate with audiences worldwide. With its thought-provoking themes and exceptional talent, this series is anticipated to be a resounding success, thereby solidifying Netflix's reputation as a purveyor of high-quality content. The show's production is currently underway, with a release date forthcoming.

articles.original_title: Deepika Padukone Shot Housefull Despite Being 'Wiped Out' By Malaria, Says Lara Dutta: 'She Was Shivering'

A2.title: Deepika Works Hard
A2.body: Deepika Padukone was very sick. She had malaria. Lara Dutta said Deepika is a good actor. She works hard. Deepika was shivering but she worked. She is very focused.

B1.title: Deepika Padukone Films Despite Illness
B1.body: Lara Dutta praised Deepika Padukone for her professionalism. Deepika was very sick with malaria but still worked on the film Housefull. She was shivering and felt unwell, but she did not stop working. Lara said Deepika is a very focused actor. This shows that Deepika is dedicated to her job and will not let illness stop her. Lara and Deepika worked together on the film. Deepika's hard work and professionalism are an example to others. She did a great job in the film despite being very sick. This is why Lara praised her so much. Deepika's focus and dedication are admirable.

B2.title: Deepika Padukone Films Despite Illness
B2.body: Lara Dutta has praised Deepika Padukone's professionalism, revealing that she shot for the film Housefull despite being severely ill with malaria. According to Lara, Deepika was 'wiped out' by the disease and was shivering, yet she still managed to perform her role. This incident showcases Deepika's dedication to her work and her ability to push through challenging situations. Lara's comments highlight the importance of perseverance and commitment in the film industry. Deepika's experience is a testament to her strong work ethic and her willingness to overcome obstacles. The fact that she was able to continue filming despite her illness is a remarkable feat. It demonstrates her resilience and ability to cope with difficult circumstances, making her a highly respected actress in the industry. Her professionalism has earned her praise from her peers, including Lara Dutta.

C1.title: Deepika Padukone's Professionalism Lauded
C1.body: Lara Dutta has extolled the virtues of Deepika Padukone's unwavering dedication to her craft, recounting an instance where the latter persevered with filming Housefull despite being afflicted with malaria. Dutta's anecdote serves as a testament to Padukone's unrelenting professionalism, as she reportedly continued to perform her role while struggling with the debilitating effects of the disease. According to Dutta, Padukone was shivering and ostensibly 'wiped out' by the illness, yet she remained resolute in her commitment to the project. This anecdote underscores the remarkable resilience and focus that Padukone brings to her work, qualities that have undoubtedly contributed to her success in the film industry. Dutta's praise for Padukone's work ethic is a significant endorsement, given her own stature as a respected actress. The incident highlights the importance of perseverance and dedication in overcoming adversity, and Padukone's actions serve as a paradigm for aspiring actors. Her ability to perform under duress is a notable aspect of her professionalism, and one that has earned her the admiration of her peers. The film industry is replete with examples of actors struggling with illness, yet Padukone's experience stands out due to her unwavering commitment to her craft.
